subject: An energy-transfer apparatus depicted as a small mechanical device suspended from a power cable, with two glowing teardrop-shaped containment vessels hanging below it; the right vessel holds a visible red Fire-type energy symbol while the left vessel is empty, illustrating the transfer of energy from one Pokemon to another
description: A schematic, almost diagrammatic illustration of an energy-transfer device against a soft white-and-green gradient background. A small cylindrical mechanical unit hangs from a cable at top, with twin curved hoses or conduits descending to two transparent teardrop-shaped vessels. The right vessel glows red and contains a Fire energy symbol; the left vessel glows green and is empty, suggesting a transfer is in motion. Subtle motion lines and a faint glow ring around the contraption convey the action of energy moving. The composition is clean, centered, and instructional in tone, typical of Trainer item cards in the Pokemon TCG.
foreground: energy transfer apparatus with twin containment vessels, one holding a red Fire energy symbol
background: soft white-to-pale-green gradient with faint glow
